raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Recent data suggests that homelessness impacts nearly 20 percent of California community college students.",
    "More than 10 percent of students in the California State University (CSU) system experience homelessness.",
    "Five percent of students in the University of California (UC) system are impacted by homelessness.",
    "Research demonstrates that students from historically underrepresented communities are disproportionately impacted by homelessness.",
    "Access to financial aid is essential for low-income students to remain enrolled and graduate with a degree.",
    "About one in five students in the Los Angeles Community College District (LACCD) have faced homelessness in the past year.",
    "Approximately two-thirds of homeless students in LACCD cannot afford to eat a balanced meal.",
    "The Department of Health Services at Pierce College has recorded a steady rise in cases of homelessness among students.",
    "Homeless students often face hunger and instability, which affects their ability to graduate and transfer to four-year institutions.",
    "AB 2416 requires colleges and universities in California to consider homelessness as an extenuating circumstance when evaluating financial aid appeals."
  ]
}
```
